tools.name: visibility_audit_info
tools.description: Explain the MeSquared SEO/AEO website-readiness methodology, its measurement boundaries, and how to use the available scan tools.

tools.name: scan_visibility
tools.description: Run a public-site SEO/AEO website-readiness scan for one business website. Returns aggregate readiness scores, selected technical and answer-quality evidence, site signals, and prioritized issues. This does not measure observed rankings, Search Console performance, or live AI mentions/citations.

tools.name: compare_visibility
tools.description: Run public-site SEO/AEO website-readiness scans for two business websites and compare aggregate scores, selected evidence, site signals, and top issues. This is a readiness comparison, not observed rank or live citation benchmarking.
